Reward items

Items that are ON show as buttons on the redeem screen and in the student app.

    Last 30 days

      Top rewards · 30 days

      Recent activity

      Made a mistake? Undo an award or redemption — it writes a correction, never deletes.

      Settings

      Earning rate

      Customers earn — for a $10 purchase (before their tier multiplier).

      Exact amount entry Let staff type the exact purchase amount on the keypad.

      Quick amount buttons

      Tap-to-award buttons on the AWARD screen. Each is a set purchase amount; points are that amount × your rate.

      Location

      Shown as a tappable map on your customers' cards — tapping it opens directions in their maps app. Leave blank to hide the map.

      Logo

      Shown next to your name on customers' cards. Square images look best — we shrink it to a small icon.

      Staff PIN

      Changing the PIN signs out every terminal — everyone re-enters the new PIN next time.

      Login password

      Change the password for this terminal's email login. You'll stay signed in on this device — use the new password next time you sign in.

      ● Unsaved changes — save before leaving this tab.

      Add item

      Unsaved changes

      You've changed your settings but haven't saved them yet. What would you like to do?

      ✓
